# anthropic_external_key (Resource)

Manages a customer-managed encryption key (CMEK) configuration for use with workspaces. Requires CMEK to be enabled for your organization. `provider_config.geo` and `provider_config` itself become immutable once any workspace references this key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "anthropic_external_key" "aws_prod" {
  display_name = "prod-cmek"
  provider_config = {
    type     = "aws"
    kms_arn  = "arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:key/abc123"
    role_arn = "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/anthropic-cmek"
    region   = "us-east-1"
  }
}

resource "anthropic_external_key" "gcp_eu" {
  display_name = "eu-cmek"
  provider_config = {
    type     = "gcp"
    key_name = "projects/p/locations/global/keyRings/r/cryptoKeys/k"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String)
- `provider_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provider_config))

### Optional

- `geo` (String) Currently only `us` is supported.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--provider_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provider_config`

Required:

- `type` (String) Provider: aws, gcp, or azure.

Optional:

- `client_id` (String) Azure only — federated identity client ID.
- `key_name` (String) GCP: resource name. Azure: Key Vault key name.
- `kms_arn` (String) AWS only — the KMS key ARN.
- `region` (String) AWS only — KMS region.
- `role_arn` (String) AWS only — the IAM role ARN Anthropic should assume.
- `tenant_id` (String) Azure only.
- `vault_uri` (String) Azure only — Key Vault URI.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import anthropic_external_key.aws_prod ekey_01SDCCSbTxrXDpWc1phhtcfK
```
